holdings.infoBox: PAWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are IDEXX Laboratories stock at 10.09%, Freshpet at 9.99%, Zoetis at 9.68%, Chewy at 8.47%, and Virbac at 7.09%.

overview.description: The ProShares Pet Care ETF (PAWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FactSet Pet Care index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of global equities related to pet ownership. PAWZ was launched on Nov 5, 2018 and is issued by ProShares.
